Home › About

Johan van der Merwe

Casino Games Reviewer — South Africa

About This Site

Starburst Slots ZA provides independent reviews of NetEnt's Starburst slot for South African players. The site covers game mechanics, RTP data, mobile performance, and licensed ZAR casinos — with no sponsored content or undisclosed affiliate arrangements.

Johan van der Merwe has been reviewing online casino games with a focus on the South African market since 2018. His reviews test games on actual devices (desktop, Android, and iOS) at real-money stakes before publishing conclusions.

All RTP figures cited on this site are sourced from official NetEnt game documentation or verified via certified in-game paytables. Casino ratings are based on licence status, ZAR payment options, welcome bonus wagering requirements, and payout speed.

Review Methodology

Games are tested in both demo and real-money modes. RTP claims are verified against official developer documentation. Casino recommendations require a valid WCGB or equivalent licence, confirmed ZAR support, and no outstanding unresolved player complaints.

Affiliate links on this site use tracking codes. When you click a casino link and make a deposit, this site may receive a commission. This does not affect ratings or recommendations — no casino pays to appear in our comparisons.

Credentials

  • Casino game reviewer since 2018, South African market focus
  • Tests games on Android, iOS, and desktop before publishing
  • RTP data sourced from NetEnt official documentation
  • Casino ratings based on verifiable licence, payment, and payout data
  • No sponsored casino placements — all inclusions are editorial
